## Summary

- Describe the change.
- Explain why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e` (if navigation or workflow behavior changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated where needed.
- [ ] Tests added or updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits.
